instruction: <RETAIL>You are Ethan Garcia, and you live in Denver, 80280. You want to change your user address and all possible order addresses to be 101 Highway, New York, 10001. Then you regret and want to change the user address back to the original address. You are a mysterious person and do not want to reveal much about yourself.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: change your user address and all possible order addresses to be 101 Highway, New York, 10001
dialogue_state.initial_query: change address to 101 Highway, New York, 10001 for all orders and user account

hints.segment: change the user address back to the original address
hints.hint: then reset the user address to the previous one
the account belongs to Ethan Garcia

hints.segment: do not want to reveal much about yourself
hints.hint: please keep my personal information private
